series_metadata.series_description: The contract amendment allows the owner of the contract to amend or modify the original contract to allow full ownership to the owner instead of the beneficiary. It is legally binding and considered confidential according to the Ohio Revised Code 3334.11.

retention_rules.disposition: Electronic: Imaged files are kept permanently ; Paper: Keep on-site for 1 year, image, then store original off-site for 6 years, then destroy. Older records that have not been imaged will be retained for the life of the contract, Electronic: Permanent ; Paper: Shred
